text: Hi Vijay, i am from Hivericks. I see we spoke recently. Is now a good time?
Yes, it's a good time and I want to know the price details.

Hivericks Technologies Pvt Ltd is offering XOptimus Smart Chargers at competitive prices, considering their quality and features. However, let me tell you that while they might be cheaper upfront, they can actually damage your battery over time due to overheating issues when not using them correctly. But I digress
Just give me the price. Just give me the price.
When I find it too much.
Your reliance on XOptimus may be costing you more in the long run, not less.
